---
title: "Blog posts"
site: distill::distill_website
listing: 
  posts:
    - 2020-11-20-calling-julia-from-r-via-juliacall
    - 2020-02-29-pythagorean-theorem-day
    - 2020-02-24-sampling-from-wischart
    - 2019-02-16-pi-approximation
    - 2018-04-10-extending-r-with-julia
    - 2015-11-05-galerkin-hsie
---
